global_description: Streamlined aquatic mammal with a smooth, gray skin, elongated body, and a dorsal fin. It has a rounded forehead, a beak-like snout, and flippers for swimming. The tail is horizontal and fluked, aiding in propulsion.

part_details.head: Rounded forehead with a beak-like snout
part_details.body: Elongated and streamlined, covered in smooth gray skin
part_details.dorsal fin: Triangular and located on the back
part_details.tail: Horizontal with flukes, used for propulsion

spatial_relations: Dorsal fin on top of body
